questions.q: Two team members have an ongoing conflict affecting productivity. First step?
options: Meet each person individually to understand perspectives
Ignore it and hope it resolves

questions.q: An employee files a harassment complaint. What must be your immediate action?
options: Document the complaint and initiate a formal investigation
Tell the employee to resolve it themselves

questions.q: What is the key principle in handling employee grievances?
A manager asks you to terminate an employee without proper documentation. You should?
options: Explain the need for a PIP or documented warnings first
Ask the employee to resign instead

questions.q: During mediation between two employees, the best approach is to?
options: Take sides with the senior employee
Remain neutral and focus on shared outcomes
